headlines.title: Iran war day 117: Nuclear inspections dispute as US Senate curbs war powers
headlines.snippet: Iran and the US are in conflict over nuclear inspections and the Strait of Hormuz, with negotiators aiming for a final deal within 60 days. This occurs as the US Senate moves to curb war powers related to Iran.

headlines.title: Israel denying Palestinian women medical care in prison
headlines.snippet: A report from the Palestinian Prisoners and Ex-Prisoners Affairs Commission highlights "catastrophic" conditions for Palestinian women in Israel's Damon Prison. They face overcrowding, medical neglect, and denial of basic rights, including care for pregnant inmates.

headlines.title: Ben-Gvir says Israel may ‘act alone’ against Iran in split with US
headlines.snippet: Israeli National Security Minister Itamar Ben-Gvir stated that the US is naive to expect Iran to abandon its nuclear program. He suggested Israel might need to act independently against this perceived threat.

headlines.title: UN report: Israel committing genocide in Gaza by deliberately targeting children
headlines.snippet: A UN commission of inquiry has concluded that Israel is committing genocide in Gaza, specifically by deliberately targeting Palestinian children. Evidence indicates these children were intentionally killed by Israeli security forces, with continued disregard for ceasefires.
